list.name: Changes
list.comment: TUI: added command "check" for each visible card on the board and each player's tribe.

project.component: { "keyToString": { "Application.Client TUI A.executor": "Run", "Application.Client TUI B.executor": "Run", "Application.ClientA.executor": "Run", "Application.ClientApp.executor": "Run", "Application.ClientB.executor": "Run", "Application.ClientC.executor": "Run", "Application.ClientD.executor": "Run", "Application.ClientE.executor": "Run", "Application.DbTestMain.executor": "Run", "Application.GuiApp.executor": "Run", "Application.NetworkServerLauncher.executor": "Run", "Application.ServerMain.executor": "Run", "Git.Working.Tree.Tab.closed.by.user": "closed", "JUnit.ArtistTest.executor": "Coverage", "JUnit.CardJsonLoaderTest.executor": "Coverage", "JUnit.CardJsonLoaderTest.shouldLoadBuilderCorrectly.executor": "Coverage", "JUnit.OfferTileTest.executor": "Coverage", "JUnit.PlayerTest.executor": "Coverage", "JUnit.SlotTest.executor": "Coverage", "JUnit.TotemTest.executor": "Coverage", "JUnit.TribeTest.executor": "Coverage", "JUnit.java in am22.executor": "Run", "ModuleVcsDetector.initialDetectionPerformed": "true", "RunOnceActivity.ShowReadmeOnStart": "true", "RunOnceActivity.TerminalTabsStorage.copyFrom.TerminalArrangementManager.252": "true", "RunOnceActivity.git.unshallow": "true", "RunOnceActivity.typescript.service.memoryLimit.init": "true", "codeWithMe.voiceChat.enabledByDefault": "false", "git-widget-placeholder": "game-version2", "ignore.virus.scanning.warn.message": "true", "kotlin-language-version-configured": "true", "last_opened_file_path": "C:/Users/jacop/IdeaProjects/am22/src/main/java/it/polimi/ingsw/am22", "node.js.detected.package.eslint": "true", "node.js.selected.package.eslint": "(autodetect)", "node.js.selected.package.tslint": "(autodetect)", "nodejs_package_manager_path": "npm", "vue.rearranger.settings.migration": "true" } }

task.summary: Json completo, modifiche TribeCharacter e event,building
Json completo, modifiche TribeCharacter e event,building
Nuovo GameController.java e aggiunto nel network.client il ClientController e ServerConnection. Piccola modifica su id di Building.json
piccole modifiche tui e fixing dei bug nel model
added some fuction for GUI and added database(SQL)
Fixing bug: gatherer and builder discount always 0, no cost to purchase a building with bonuscard.
Fixing bug: resized the gamescreen avoiding the scrolling.
Optimized MVC design, reduced javadoc. Gamescreen adjusted.
putted default values of socket and rmi ports on ServerMain

add graceful shutdown for RMI and socket transports RmiServerEndpoint.publish() now returns a Handle holding the Registry and endpoint references, so ServerMain can unbind and unexport on JVM shutdown. Without this the port stayed bound for the lifetime of the process, blocking in-process restarts.
gameserver and matchecontroller name modified and matchmanager and matchsession separation
TUI: added command "check" for each visible card on the board and each player's tribe.
TUI: added command "check" for each visible card on the board and each player's tribe.

MESSAGE.value: Initial version
Second version
Second version of Building
last commit
Json completo, modifiche TribeCharacter e event,building
Nuovo GameController.java e aggiunto nel network.client il ClientController e ServerConnection. Piccola modifica su id di Building.json
modifiche reti
piccole modifiche tui e fixing dei bug nel model
con la parte di multipartita (incompleta)
still fixed GUI
added some fuction for GUI and added database(SQL)
fixed some bug of GUI
Fixing bug: gatherer and builder discount always 0, no cost to purchase a building with bonuscard.
Fixing bug: resized the gamescreen avoiding the scrolling.
Optimized MVC design, reduced javadoc. Gamescreen adjusted.
merged observableServerConnection with serverConnection.
adjust the nickname' uniqueness
putted default values of socket and rmi ports on ServerMain

add graceful shutdown for RMI and socket transports RmiServerEndpoint.publish() now returns a Handle holding the Registry and endpoint references, so ServerMain can unbind and unexport on JVM shutdown. Without this the port stayed bound for the lifetime of the process, blocking in-process restarts.
reorderd packages and files
gameserver and matchecontroller name modified and matchmanager and matchsession separation
TUI: added command "check" for each visible card on the board and each player's tribe.

option.name: LAST_COMMIT_MESSAGE
option.value: TUI: added command "check" for each visible card on the board and each player's tribe.
